data.evidence: Added go-auto run_envelope with preflight/budget/run-until/checkpoint/result schema; verified pytest -q and make check.

Documented Hermes executor boundary for go auto: execution_policy plus run_envelope, immediate tool-call loop, verification/recheck/devil/harden, finish evidence, self-reflect, and compact handoff. Verified pytest -q and make check.
Router now distinguishes create_repo from repair_existing_repo and repair examples include --skip-repo-complete; direct tests cover existing git repo without .go. Verified pytest -q and make check.

Self-reflect follow-up implemented: go spike now has --task-scope code|docs; default code generates tasks with cli/go.py, tests/**, docs/** and Makefile scope, preventing manual scope repair for implementation repos. Verified pytest -q and make check.

Implemented go auto/go-loop --emit-handoff with go-workflow.agent-handoff.v1 including repo, mode, target runtime, tasks, scope, gates, expected evidence, execution_policy, and run_envelope. Verified pytest -q, make check, and go-project-template make check.

python3 cli/go.py validate . passed; python3 cli/go.py template-check ../go-project-template --json ok=true

Documented bare-go autonomous loop contract; updated vision/principles, README, router docs, runtime skill, CLI loop contract, and tests; verification passed: python3 cli/go.py validate ., make check, pytest -q, git diff --check

Added go auto/go-loop budget fields max_minutes, max_commands, checkpoint_every_tasks, quiet telegram_policy, command/checkpoint result accounting, tests for budget envelope and checkpoints; verification: pytest -q 10 passed; make check passed; git diff --check passed

Upgraded auto --execute result model with commands_run/checkpoints/budget_exhausted, max command/minute budget enforcement, own-lifecycle dirty continuation across multiple tasks, actionable safety/blocked states, and regression test for two-task execution; verification: pytest -q 10 passed; make check passed

Added bare  CLI universal router that distinguishes missing repo/missing .go/invalid contract from repo-local execution, creates a scoped task from actionable intent when no open task exists, returns go-auto/go-loop plan, and has regression test; verification: pytest -q 10 passed; make check passed
Added explicit no-command-spam rule and hard-gate-only ask policy to repo-local-agent-workflow skill; verified with python3 cli/go.py validate ., template-check JSON, git diff --check

Self-reflect follow-up resolved: bare go now has CLI subcommand, intent task creation, go-loop routing, budgeted handoff, skill no-command-spam mandate, and full green verification; checks: python3 cli/go.py validate ., make check, pytest -q 10 passed, git diff --check

Added explicit bare go --write boundary: default go --json with intent is non-mutating and returns proposed_task/write_boundary; --write or --execute materializes intent-created tasks. Verification: pytest -q 10 passed; make check passed; python3 cli/go.py validate . passed; git diff --check passed.

Added structured go-loop/auto execute attempts with build/verify/critic/repair/judge fields, auto.attempt events, and failing verification critic evidence before blocking. Verification: pytest -q 11 passed; make check passed; python3 cli/go.py validate . passed; git diff --check passed.

Added docs/autonomy-benchmark.md with PASS/PARTIAL/MISS Ralph/Oh-My-Codex matrix and promotion criteria; linked from go-autonomous-loop docs; test asserts proven/partial/missing claims. Verification: pytest -q 12 passed; make check passed; python3 cli/go.py validate . passed; git diff --check passed.

Implemented pluggable Ralph-style executor adapter hooks: --build-command, --critic-command, --repair-command, --max-attempts; go-loop now runs bounded attempt ladder with build/verify/critic/repair/judge evidence and can repair a failing fixture without user intervention. Verification: pytest -q 13 passed; make check passed; validate passed; git diff --check passed.

Promoted autonomy benchmark to PASS where adapter proof exists: docs/autonomy-benchmark.md now states Ralph/Oh-My-Codex-style runtime via adapter boundary; docs/go-autonomous-loop.md and repo-local skill document build/critic/repair adapter hooks and honest limits. Verification: pytest -q 13 passed; make check passed; validate passed; git diff --check passed.

Corrected Ralph/OMX benchmark overclaim: full autonomous runtime and equivalence are PARTIAL until default adapters/artifacts/followups/resume/ship policy are proven. Added regression test preventing blanket PASS equivalence claim. Verification: pytest -q and make check passed.

Added per-attempt artifact ledger under .go/runs/<task-id>/attempt-XX/ with prompt.md, verify.log, critic.md, diff.patch, verdict.json. Attempt JSONL now links artifacts. Verification: pytest -q 13 passed; make check passed.

Added built-in semantic critic flag and critic follow-up generation. --semantic-critic blocks generic/default acceptance or missing verification; --followup-on-block creates scoped .go follow-up tasks from critic findings. Verification: pytest -q 14 passed; make check passed.

Added --repair-agent codex/hermes adapter option and real mini Python package repair fixture. go-loop now proves failing pytest package repair without user intervention, beyond toy answer.txt. Verification: pytest -q 16 passed; make check passed.

Added durable .go/runs/latest.json resume state and explicit ship policy none/local-commit/push with push gated by --allow-push. Local commit ship test proves clean git after go-loop execution. Updated benchmark and skill docs. Verification: pytest -q 17 passed; validate passed; make check passed; git diff --check passed.

RED reproduced read-only and pre-existing dirty scope bypasses. GREEN: four focused adapter scope tests pass; modify-only scopes, glob matching, and content fingerprints enforce net adapter changes.

RED reproduced unauthorized push leaving task done and failed commit leaving inconsistent lifecycle. GREEN: policy gate keeps verified task active; failed local commit rolls lifecycle/evidence back; successful local commit remains green.

RED fresh template auto blocked on obsolete placeholder command. GREEN: template has executable validate-go script; first auto completes in a clean copied repo; template-check now performs behavioral auto execution; stack and template make check pass.

Contract hardening complete: cross-file project/hierarchy/task validation; pre-claim contract_gate for generic acceptance; semantic critic default-on; GO_CONTEXT_JSON carries vision/principles/hierarchy/evidence/decisions; process-group timeouts; open work after budget reports budget_exhausted; 35 pytest tests and make check pass.

Goal completion hardened: blocked/active tasks prevent done; task budget with open work reports budget_exhausted; final audit requires valid linked contract, done-task evidence, declared success metrics, and passing project default verification. 37 pytest tests pass.

38 smoke tests pass; make check passes; agent-mode tasks safely select Codex/Hermes, mechanical mode opts out, deep critic BLOCK triggers repair and PASS is required, and prompt artifacts retain vision/principles.

39 smoke tests pass; deterministic two-task agent campaign builds, receives critic BLOCK, repairs to PASS, commits, stops on task budget, executes persisted absolute resume command, completes second task, and passes final goal audit; stack/template make checks and diff checks pass together.

RED proved GO_EXECUTOR_AGENT was ignored and resume embedded a Mac absolute path; GREEN proves env default with explicit override, portable relocated-stack resume, uncommitted lifecycle continuation, 41 tests, and make check.

RED proved doctor and launcher absent and future stack requirements ignored; GREEN adds v0.2.0 compatibility gating, WSL/Hermes doctor, portable ./go launcher for template and generated projects, 44 tests, and paired template checks.

TDD: stack_ref and template-status tests failed before implementation and now pass. Full regression: 50 tests. Release preflight verified v0.2.0 synchronization and explicitly performed no publish. Doctor now reports required immutable ref compatibility.

RED: template-check returned goal_incomplete after successfully executing the synthetic task. GREEN: focused pairing and real-project completion tests pass. Regression: 50 tests; template mode now emits a setup-only completion audit while project goal audits are unchanged.

TDD cycles: migrate command absent -> transactional dry-run/apply/idempotence and rollback green; custom adapter lacked protocol env -> versioned request/result green; invalid result validator absent -> fail-closed validator green; modular/schema artifacts absent -> importable package and JSON schemas green. Regression: 55 tests, make check, editable-package import, release-check v0.3.0, and template local WSL check all passed. Critic: version compatibility restored through go version --json plus legacy fallback; no hosted automation references remain.

57 pytest tests passed; release-check 0.3.1 passed local Linux/WSL verification and template pairing; exact same-version wrong-commit bootstrap rejection, doctor exact-ref reporting, annotated tag-to-HEAD enforcement, and explicit GO_STACK_ALLOW_DEV=1 override verified; template commit 0a963e8.

60 pytest tests and make check passed; routing, task-state, and native-adapter owners are importable; Codex/Hermes build, critic, and repair require validated agent-adapter-result.v1 output; malformed or missing native protocol fails closed while custom legacy adapters remain compatible.

62 pytest tests, make check, and diff check passed; stack update dry-run leaves project and updates directory untouched; apply verifies tag commit, declared runtime version, and contract compatibility before atomic write; rollback record contains before/after state; missing and mismatched tags fail before mutation.

65 pytest tests and make check passed; concurrent claim race has exactly one winner and one claim event; 90 concurrent JSONL appends remain complete and parseable; live flock cannot be stolen; killed owner is recovered with stale evidence; JSON writes and queue transitions use fsync plus atomic replace/move.
